## Summary

Brief description of the changes introduced by this pull request.

Closes #<issue_number>

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat`: New feature
- [ ] `fix`: Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor`: Code refactoring without behavioral change
- [ ] `chore`: Dependency updates, tooling, build configuration
- [ ] `docs`: Documentation updates
- [ ] `style`: Formatting, design system updates

## Verification & Pre-Merge Checklist

- [ ] All pre-commit hooks passed locally (`lint-staged`, `typecheck`, `astro check`, `pnpm test:e2e`).
- [ ] CI pipeline checks passed in GitHub Actions.
- [ ] Verified responsive layout and accessibility across mobile and desktop viewports.
